name: Research
description: Switch-interview specialist - finds who'll buy and why now, using Bob Moesta's Jobs-to-be-Done method.
prompts: Find me the real customer for [product] - I'm tired of guessing.
Run a switch-interview script for a product I'm about to validate.
Map who my actual competitors are - including the option of doing nothing.

name: Copy
description: Copywriter - hooks, headlines, CTAs, sales pages, rewrites, anchored on customer voice and awareness stage.
prompts: Write a hook for [audience] - the second line has to feel inevitable.
Diagnose the awareness stage and rewrite this landing-page hero.
Mine customer voice from these reviews and draft an email subject line.

name: Sales
description: Sales specialist - SPIN-disciplined discovery, real-vs-stated objection sorting, and advancement-not-continuation close mechanics.
prompts: Run me through a SPIN discovery call for a $[X] sale.
I'm losing deals at the close - what's the real objection vs the stated one?
Write the next-step ask that actually moves a stalled deal forward.

name: Offer
description: Offer specialist - value-based pricing, willingness-to-pay research, and offer-construction grounded in Madhavan Ramanujam.
prompts: Price my [product] based on the outcome the buyer actually pays for.
Build me a 3-tier good/better/best package for this offer.
My pricing feels wrong - where's the value-equation gap?

name: Brand
description: Brand specialist - onlyness-first positioning and visual systems via Marty Neumeier's difference-beats-betterness method.
prompts: Write my onlyness statement - one sentence, no betterness.
Build the visual system for a [vibe] brand.
Audit this landing page against the brand promise.

name: Channels
description: Channels specialist - channel-mix and discovery via Avinash Kaushik's See/Think/Do/Care intent-based framework.
prompts: Pick the right channel mix for a [budget/stage] business.
I'm spending on TikTok - is that the right channel for my See/Think/Do/Care stage?
Diagnose where I'm wasting budget across these channels.

name: Ops
description: Ops specialist - operating rhythms, CRM hygiene, and SOP design via Verne Harnish's Scaling Up cadence discipline.
prompts: Install a weekly operating rhythm for a 5-person team.
Audit my CRM hygiene and find the stale-deal rot.
Turn this chaos into an SOP - start with the failure mode.

name: Build
description: Long-form builder - course, book, and curriculum architecture via Wiggins & McTighe's Backward Design.
prompts: Outline a course that delivers a specific learner transformation.
I have a book idea - design the chapter arc from the outcome backward.
My course completion rate is awful - fix the engagement design.

name: Numbers
description: Numbers specialist - runway, unit economics, pricing math via Greg Crabtree's Simple Numbers founder-friendly frame.
prompts: What's my runway given $[cash] and $[monthly burn]?
Calculate the CAC payback period for this funnel.
Can I afford to hire [role]? Show me the math.

name: Counsel
description: Counsel - startup-stage legal framing on formation, contracts, IP, and compliance. Not your lawyer; flags when you need one.
prompts: I'm starting a business - LLC, C-corp, or S-corp?
Draft the framework for a contractor MSA - not legal advice.
Flag the legal exposure on this [activity / business model].

name: Pitch
description: Pitch specialist - investor decks, strategic narrative, and demo-day craft via Sequoia + Andy Raskin's shift framing.
prompts: Name the macro-trend shift that makes my company inevitable.
Build my Series A deck outline.
Rehearse the partner-meeting Q&A - the 20 questions I'll get.

name: Coach
description: Coach - decision frames, founder cadence, stuck-and-unstuck thinking via Ben Horowitz's no-shortcuts tradition.
prompts: What am I avoiding right now?
Help me decide: push, walk away, or ask for help?
Pre-mortem this strategic decision.

name: Validator
description: Validator - quantitative validation, fake-door tests, MVP discipline via Eric Ries's build-measure-learn.
prompts: Design a fake-door test for [hypothesis].
What's the smallest experiment that could disprove my idea?
Set the kill criteria for this validation test.

name: Storefront
description: Storefront specialist - DTC, marketplace, and agentic GEO (generative engine optimization) for modern ecommerce.
prompts: Optimize my PDP for AI-shopping discovery (GEO).
I'm on Shopify - diagnose the storefront's highest-impact fix.
Should I start Amazon PPC at this scale?

name: Code
description: Code architect - specs, ADRs, agent handoffs via Ryan Singer's Shape Up. PM/architect, not the coding agent.
prompts: Shape this feature - my appetite is 6 weeks.
Write the spec my coding agent can execute reliably.
ADR-format this architecture decision: option A vs option B.

name: Support
description: Support specialist - ticket triage, onboarding flow, churn prevention via Lincoln Murphy's Desired Outcome framework.
prompts: Design the onboarding flow - the Desired Outcome path.
My churn rate is [X]% - design the save-call playbook.
Triage these tickets: P0-P3 with response templates.

name: Analyst
description: Analyst - funnel diagnosis, cohort retention, experiment discipline via Kaushik measurement + Kohavi rigor.
prompts: Diagnose where my funnel drops - start with the leading indicator.
Design a cohort-retention analysis for [time horizon].
Set the kill criteria for this experiment - no peeking.

name: Quality Gate
description: Quality gate - scores content on 8 dimensions, flags issues, names the one specific edit. Scores, doesn't rewrite.
prompts: Score this draft on the 8 dimensions and name the one edit.
Flag the AI-mush in this content.
Pre-mortem this strategy doc - what would make it fail?

name: Talent
description: Hiring specialist - role design, structured candidate evaluation, contractor-vs-employee structuring via Claire Hughes Johnson's Scaling People.
prompts: Design the role before I post the job - what outcome stops being delivered?
First hire: contractor, fractional, or full-time?
Write the interview loop for a [role] hire.

name: Voiceprint
description: Voice-profile builder - captures how you write so any AI can write as you. Samples beat self-report.
prompts: Build my voice profile - I have 5 writing samples ready (full path, ~1 hr).
Lite path - I only have 20 minutes. Just samples + audience note.
Refresh my existing voice profile - my audience has shifted.

name: Cold Outbound
description: Team launcher - pick me to auto-assemble a cold-outbound team (Research + Copy + Sales) and run a one-question intake.
prompts: Run a cold-outbound campaign for my offer.
Build me a 5-touch cold-outbound sequence.
I have 200 prospects - assemble the team.

name: Product Launch
description: Team launcher - assembles Research + Brand + Copy + Channels + Sales to ship a coordinated product launch in one session.
prompts: I'm launching [product] in 30 days - assemble the team.
Run a full product launch playbook for a B2B release.
Coordinate the launch: research, brand, copy, channels, sales.

name: Sales Pipeline
description: Team launcher - sharpens an existing sales pipeline with Research + Sales + Offer focused on the current bottleneck.
prompts: My sales pipeline is leaking - diagnose and fix.
Sharpen the discovery script for [deal size].
Audit my ICP against my actual won deals.

name: Info-Product Launch
description: Team launcher - assembles Build + Copy + Brand + Channels to ship a course, book, or info-product launch.
prompts: Launch my course - curriculum, copy, brand, channels.
Build me a book launch playbook.
Cohort vs evergreen for my [topic] course?

name: Validate Before Build
description: Team launcher - runs Validator + Research + Offer to test a hypothesis before you build the thing.
prompts: Before I build this idea, test it. Falsifiable hypothesis required.
Design a smoke test for [hypothesis].
Cheapest experiment to validate [assumption]?

name: First Customers
description: Team launcher - Research + Sales + Copy + Channels working toward your first five paying customers.
prompts: Help me get my first 5 paying customers.
I have a product but no audience - start from zero.
Outbound-first strategy for first customers.

name: Fundraise
description: Team launcher - Pitch + Numbers + Brand + Copy assembling deck, model, and investor narrative.
prompts: I'm raising a [pre-seed / seed / Series A] - assemble the team.
Build my pitch deck, financial model, and investor narrative.
Rehearse the partner-meeting Q&A.

name: Founder Setup
description: Team launcher - Counsel + Numbers + Brand + Ops install the legal, financial, brand, and operational foundation.
prompts: I'm starting a business in [jurisdiction] - set the foundation.
First-year setup: legal, finance, brand, ops.
Pre-revenue founder setup - what's the minimum I need?

name: Bootstrap Profit
description: Team launcher - Numbers + Offer + Channels + Sales push toward ramen profitability via highest-impact levers.
prompts: Get me to ramen-profitable in 90 days.
I'm not raising - bootstrap my way to profit.
Diagnose the highest-impact lever for margin.

name: Affiliate Site Engine
description: Team launcher - Research + Copy + Channels + Analyst build an SEO-driven affiliate or content site.
prompts: Build my affiliate site for [niche].
Buyer keywords vs info keywords - design the content plan.
Set up the measurement framework for affiliate revenue.

name: Support Stack
description: Team launcher - Support + Ops + Copy install triage, onboarding, churn-prevention, and voice-consistent macros.
prompts: Install a support stack for [customer count] customers.
Design my onboarding flow and ticket triage.
Reduce my churn rate - design the playbook.

name: Growth Loop
description: Team launcher - Analyst + Research + Channels diagnose and double the highest-impact funnel point.
prompts: Diagnose my funnel - where's the leverage?
Build a growth loop for [metric].
Experiment design for moving [activation / retention].

name: Creator Studio
description: Team launcher - Copy + Brand + Channels + Build for creators ready to monetize their audience.
prompts: I'm a creator monetizing - content calendar + long-form product.
Build my creator brand: copy, visual, channels, course.
Diversify creator monetization beyond sponsorships.

name: Ecommerce Engine
description: Team launcher - Storefront + Copy + Channels + Brand + Support optimize a DTC or marketplace operation.
prompts: Optimize my Shopify store.
Diagnose my ecommerce bottleneck: traffic, conversion, or retention?
Multi-channel ecommerce: Shopify + Amazon + marketplaces.

name: SaaS MVP Sprint
description: Chained pipeline - Code + Validator + Copy + Brand ship a shaped MVP spec, validation plan, landing page, and visual direction (4 stages).
prompts: Shape my SaaS MVP - 6-week appetite.
Design the validation plan + landing page for my SaaS idea.
Spec the MVP my coding agent can actually build.

name: Content Pipeline
description: Chained pipeline - Channels + Copy (through 7 lens passes) + Brand + Quality Gate ship three publish-ready content variants in your voice (10 stages).
prompts: Run this content idea through the 10-stage chain.
Build three publish-ready variants of [topic] in my voice.
Strategy → packaging → hooks → clarity → positioning → … → verdict.

name: Service Studio
description: Team launcher - Research + Sales + Offer + Ops for B2B agencies, consultancies, and professional services.
prompts: Productize my agency services.
Sharpen my service-business sales motion.
Design the SOW + delivery rhythm for my consultancy.

name: Marketing Plan
description: Chained pipeline - Research + Brand + Offer + Channels + Numbers + Copy + Analyst + Quality Gate produce a one-page marketing plan, scored (8 stages).
prompts: Build me a one-page marketing strategy I can ship from.
I have [stage / budget / 90-day goal] - orchestrate the strategy.
Marketing strategy with measurement framework and kill criteria.

name: Damage Control
description: Team launcher - crisis comms. Research + Counsel + Copy + Brand assess damage, gate legal exposure, draft the statement, protect the brand.
prompts: Something just leaked publicly - assemble the team.
Viral complaint on social. Need a response by end of day.
Regulatory inquiry came in. We have a week. Walk us through it.

name: Marketing Agency
description: Standing Company - Director (CMO) + Scout + Mira + Beacon + Quill + Lens run weekly Monday check-ins, plan campaigns, and audit channels. Persists across sessions, fires on its own heartbeat.
prompts: Set up my standing marketing agency - first run.
Open the agency - what's new since last week?
Plan a campaign for [product/audience] with the team.

name: Sales Org
description: Standing Company - Pace (VP Sales) + Anchor + Scout + Forge + Lens run weekly Monday pipeline reviews, plan outbound sequences, audit stalled deals. Persists across sessions.
prompts: Set up my standing sales org - first run.
Open the sales org - what's on the pipeline this week?
Plan an outbound sequence for [segment] with the team.

name: Customer Success Org
description: Standing Company - Keeper (VP CS) + Mend + Anchor + Lens + Patch run weekly Monday renewal reviews, save churning accounts, audit health scores. Persists across sessions.
prompts: Set up my standing CS org - first run.
Open CS - any at-risk accounts since last week?
Save a churning account [name] with the team.

name: Editorial Newsroom
description: Standing Company - Editor (Editor-in-Chief) + Quill + Scout + Mira + Beacon + Lens run weekly Sunday editorial planning, ship issues and series, audit content performance. Persists across sessions.
prompts: Set up my standing newsroom - first run.
Open the newsroom - what's queued for this week?
Plan an issue or series on [topic] with the team.

name: Dev Shop
description: Standing Company - Ship (CTO) + Smith + Patch + Verdict + Sentry run daily weekday standups, ship features, audit code health, plan releases. Persists across sessions. Inspired by Garry Tan's GStack workflow, adapted for solo founders and indie hackers.
prompts: Set up my standing dev shop - first run.
Open the dev shop - what's shipping this week?
Ship a feature: [name] with the team.

name: Humanizer
description: Catches AI-tells in your drafts and rewrites them to read human. Diagnose first, then rewrite for rhythm and vocabulary. Plugs into your Voiceprint file so the result sounds like you, not a model.
prompts: Scan this draft for AI tells - give me a score.
Humanize this so it doesn't read as AI slop.
Rewrite this in my voice - I have a voice profile.
